summary: The conjecture that every (sub)cubic graph $G$ satisfies $\chi_s'(G) \le 6$ remains open. Significant partial progress has been made: the bound $\chi_s'(G) \le 6$ has been confirmed for subcubic multigraphs with $\text{mad}(G) < 5/2$, for cubic Halin graphs, and an infinite family of cubic graphs achieving $\chi_s'(G) = 6$ has been constructed (confirming tightness), but the full conjecture is unresolved.

since_posted.title: Star chromatic index of subcubic multigraphs
since_posted.authors: Hui Lei, Yongtang Shi, Zi-Xia Song
since_posted.claim: Proves $\chi_s'(G) \le 6$ for every subcubic multigraph $G$ with $\text{mad}(G) < 5/2$, and $\chi_s'(G) \le 5$ if $\text{mad}(G) < 24/11$.

since_posted.title: On star edge colorings of bipartite and subcubic graphs
since_posted.authors: Carl Johan Casselgren, Jonas B. Granholm, André Raspaud
since_posted.claim: Settles the conjecture $\chi_s'(G) \le 6$ for cubic Halin graphs, and proves tight bounds for star chromatic index of complete bipartite and restricted bipartite graphs.

since_posted.title: Star Edge Coloring of Outerplanar and Cubic Graphs: Bounds and Constructions
since_posted.authors: Xingchao Deng, Yan Liu, Xinge Feng
since_posted.venue: Bulletin of the Malaysian Mathematical Sciences Society
since_posted.claim: Constructs an infinite sequence of cubic graphs $G$ with $\chi_s'(G) = ch_s'(G) = 6$, confirming the tightness of the conjectured bound, and establishes new bounds for striped maximal outerplanar graphs.

notes: The Lei-Shi-Song 2017 paper (arXiv 1701.04105) may have been published in a journal; DOI not verified from the fetch. The Casselgren-Granholm-Raspaud paper was verified via its arXiv preprint (1912.02467); the ScienceDirect page returned 403. The Springer 2025 paper was verified via a redirect URL with a temporary session code; the canonical DOI is 10.1007/s40840-025-01875-9. No paper resolving the full conjecture for all subcubic graphs was found.
